title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
